def community_graph(n):

    vertex_to_bin = basin("CO H(acid,CO=H(HOCHCO))", return_sorted=True)
    vertex = "0"
    V_old = list(G)
    vals = [number(vertex_to_bin) for vertex in G.vertex]

    ind, indrow = lookup_index(row)
    G = G.subgraph(indrow)
    temp = lfilter(
        nx.label, adjac_matrix(*V_old)[ind], G.edges["0", "1"].values, fill_value=0
    )
